title: Will the **high temp in Miami** be 76-77° on Mar 20, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded at Miami International Airport for March 20, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is between 76-77°, then the market resolves to Yes.
